en.title: Web Development in New York | Enterprise Digital Solutions
en.description: Top-tier web development agency in NYC. We build fast, accessible, and scalable tech platforms for startups and enterprises across New York.
en.h1: NYC-Scale Web Engineering for Ambitious Businesses
en.p: AVPdev builds Wall Street-grade Next.js platforms, SaaS MVPs, and intelligent automation for New York's fastest-growing startups and enterprises.

benefits.title: Enterprise-Grade Scale
benefits.desc: Our architectures handle high traffic spikes, ensuring your application stays up during intense media coverage or marketing drops.

benefits.title: ADA Compliance
benefits.desc: We natively implement rigorous accessibility (a11y) standards crucial for operating within US and NY state regulations.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in New York?
faq.a: Pricing starts from $250 for Astro landing pages and $300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from $750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from $50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
